---
title: "\'Account of the Consecration of the Rev. W. K. Macrorie\'"
---

## \'Account of the Consecration of the Rev. W. K. Macrorie\'
**Date:** 1869
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (May 1869) 449-454

### Notes

It seems likely that this was written by Mary Anderson Morshead.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
